title: eupatorium lymansmithii
intro: Eupatorium lymansmithii, also known as Lymansmith's Joe-Pye Weed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Eupatorium lymansmithii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
